title: 7 Piece Cookie Cutters with Shapes of Cartoon Animals, Unicorn, Dinosaur, Heart and Star for Cookies, Sandwiches, Pies and Cakes
features: 7 Unique Shapes of Cookie Cutters, including Classical Cartoon Animals, Dinosaur, Unicorn, Heart and Star, which are popular with children.

They had a perfect size, not too big, not too small, just right. Mickey Head 4" x 3.5", Minnie Head 3.5" x 4", Mickey Ear 3.5" x 3",Unicorn 3.5" x 3.4," Dinosaur 3.2" x 2.6", Star 3.5" x 3.5", Heart 3.3" x 3.1". They work really well, easy to clean and easy to use.
Our Cookie Cutters are made of food grade stainless steel with 0.3 mm thickness, won't be easy to bend or break. No rust. The tops have a rolled edge so it won’t hurt hands when pressing down.

Great as a pancake mold, sandwich cutter or for cutting cookie dough, fondant, soft fruits, bread, sandwiches, cheese, or craft clay, ideal for parties or to do activities with your kids and family. All will turn out great.
We will reply to you asap no matter for what problem you contact us. Don’t hesitate to let us know once you have problems.
description: Material: Food grade stainless steel. Package: 7 x Cookie Cutters.
